title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.327 - James R. Ledbetter Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on Missouri Highway 5 crossing over I-44 in Laclede County
text:
227.327.  James R. Ledbetter Memorial Bridge designated for the bridge on Missouri Highway 5 crossing over I-44 in Laclede County. — The bridge on Missouri Highway 5 crossing over Interstate 44 in Laclede County shall be designated the "James R. Ledbetter Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating the bridge with the costs for such designation to be paid for by private donation.
(L. 2014 H.B. 1866)
